mapper.select: select c.*, u.user_no, u.nick_name from ai_c_card_code c left join ai_c_user u on u.user_id = c.used_user_id where c.card_code_id = #{cardCodeId}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_card_code (package_id, package_name, card_code, power_num, bonus_power_num, status, used_user_id, order_id, used_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{packageId}, #{packageName}, #{cardCode}, #{powerNum}, #{bonusPowerNum}, #{status}, #{usedUserId}, #{orderId}, #{usedTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})

insert into ai_c_card_code (package_id, package_name, card_code, power_num, bonus_power_num, status, create_time, remark) values
(#{item.packageId}, #{item.packageName}, #{item.cardCode}, #{item.powerNum}, #{item.bonusPowerNum}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from ai_c_card_code where card_code_id in
#{cardCodeId}
